docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY GUNARDI, PRIYANTO AS TO DEFENDANT BELL, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
